title: Blewe's Juice Time
description: Expansion on some vanilla crops to be made into juices. Compress into blocks
body:
Small mod that expands on vanilla crops into juices. There are 9 total juices you can make: Apple, Beet, Carrot, Chorus Fruit, Glow Berry, Golden Apple, Golden Carrot, Melon, and Sweet Berry. You can compress these into Barrels (which are decoration blocks) you can place, or uncompress back into juice boxes.

Did I mention there is also chocolate milk?

Designed for Fabric. You may add to modpacks.

Models made with BlockTech
Mod made with MCreator
